top_signals.title: Tech Stocks Slide as Oil Climbs on US-Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in tech giants sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil jumped after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed officials fret over inflation risk, weigh rate hikes - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Fed officials fret over inflation risk, weigh rate hikes  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Wall Street tech stocks fall after Asian chipmakers hammered
top_signals.summary: Oil jumps as US-Iran hostilities escalate and investors go into ‘risk-off’ mode
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apple’s $650 Billion Rally Fueled by Traders Fleeing AI Selloff
top_signals.summary: Investors are flocking back to Apple Inc. as nervousness about artificial intelligence spending weighs on the stocks of chipmakers and cloud-computing giants.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Coinbase Ventures tops crypto VC list for H1 2026
top_signals.summary: Coinbase’s venture capital arm leads 2026 crypto investing even as funding withered and unique investors shied away amid the bear market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, May 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. goods and services trade deficit increased in May 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit increased from $54.6 billion in April (revised) to $77.6 billion in May, as exports decreased and imports increased. The goods deficit increased $23.6 billion in May to $106.5 billion. The services surplus increased $0.6 billion in May to $28.9 billion. Full Text
